contestedTitles: No fetch timeout on client or server: a hung (not failed) Open-Meteo leaves an indefinite silent loading state
Client-side mapping of the route's typed { error: "failed" } result to the error Notice is asserted only for a thrown fetch, not for a non-OK/zod-failed handler body
Undocumented constant: route handler requests count=8 with no spec/scenario backing
resolution: All 9 confirmed + 3 contested findings fixed by the implementer (+6 guarding tests, 265 total) and verified (battery green; key fixes spot-checked present). MAJOR stale-geoError fixed (cleared on typing + selection, tested). loading state surfaced (aria-busy + polite status). aria-controls dangling fixed. server + client fetch timeouts added (hung upstream -> calm error, not infinite loading). count=8 + unauthenticated-keyless-relay MVP decision documented. Added tests: Tab-past-combobox, geolocation console-silence, route {error} body -> Notice, geoError-clears-on-typing. 3 findings correctly rejected. Battery: lint, typecheck, 265 tests, build (/ static), openspec, trace.
